# HELP byes_frame_received_total total frames received
# TYPE byes_frame_received_total counter
byes_frame_received_total 12
# HELP byes_frame_completed_total completed frames
# TYPE byes_frame_completed_total counter
byes_frame_completed_total{outcome="ok"} 12
# HELP byes_e2e_latency_ms e2e latency
# TYPE byes_e2e_latency_ms histogram
byes_e2e_latency_ms_count 12
byes_e2e_latency_ms_sum 1500
byes_e2e_latency_ms_bucket{le="100"} 3
byes_e2e_latency_ms_bucket{le="200"} 12
byes_e2e_latency_ms_bucket{le="+Inf"} 12
